label: Sequence Generation
description: De novo designs peptide or protein sequences conditioned on structural constraints, target surface topology, or functional objectives using generative deep learning and structure-aware modeling.

defaultInputs.name: Conditioning Data
defaultInputs.tooltip: Optional data for conditioning or seeding the generation.

defaultOutputs.name: Generated Sequences
defaultOutputs.tooltip: CSV containing generated sequences and scores.

defaultOutputs.name: Generation Log
defaultOutputs.tooltip: Log file with generation parameters and details.

defaultOutputs.name: Filtered Candidates (FASTA)
defaultOutputs.tooltip: FASTA file of the best candidates.

configSchema.label: Task
configSchema.tooltip: Select what task you'd like to perform with RFdiffusion.
